pr.title: Non-record: Compression moonshots — 8 negative/marginal findings (Procrustes, SWA smoothness, selective fp16, pruning+zstd)

output.summary: Checkpoint analyses catalog compression failures—from Procrustes transport and fp16 embedding choices to SWA smoothness—to highlight codec limits around int6+zstd.
techniques: Rotational Procrustes transport evaluation vs codec entropy
Selective fp16 embedding atop int6+zstd plus GPTQ-lite quant tweaks
SWA/EMA smoothness and pruning+zstd artifact interactions
